title: Mcheli-O
description: Mcheli Overdrive aims to be as realistic as possible while providing players with an immersive and exciting Military Technology Minecraft experience. It is a modified version of the original Mcheli mod, which includes significant changes and improvements.
body:
NOTE: This mod is for forge version 1.7.10 and may need to be unzipped in order to function properly.

Do you like minecraft? Do you like warzones? Well you're in luck! Introducing Mcheli Overdrive - the ultimate Minecraft mod that adds a whole new level of excitement and immersion to your gaming experience.

With Mcheli Overdrive, you can take to the skies in some of the most advanced aircraft ever created such as the B-2A Spirit! Engage in intense dogfights with planes such as the P-51 or F-16, and rain destruction on your enemies from above with close air support such as the A-10 Warthog. Or, you can hop in a tried and true tank like the M1A2 Abrams or APC such as the M2 Bradley and charge headlong into battle, blasting your way through enemy defenses and clearing the way for your allies.

But that's not all - Mcheli Overdrive also adds compatibility with Hbm's Nuclear Tech, which means you can now deploy devastating nuclear weapons in your quest for world dominance. And with improved vehicle handling and a special compatibility fix for use with Realistic Fluids, the world around you will feel even more alive and immersive than ever before.

So what are you waiting for? Install Mcheli Overdrive today and get ready to take your Minecraft gaming experience to the next level!



ATTENTION:

Mcheli Overdrive requires HBM's Nuclear Tech to function. You can download that mod here: https://modrinth.com/mod/ntm
